name: Bok Choy
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the bok choy in cold water.
2. Cut the stalks into 1-inch pieces and the leaves into thin shreds.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the stems to the pan and sauté, tossing occasionally, for about 2 minutes.
5. Add the garlic, leaves, crystaline fructose, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
6. Continue cooking over high heat for an additional 2 minutes.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLES EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 40; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 1g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 59mg; FAT: 2g.
